items.title: Scientists finally crack an “undruggable” pancreatic cancer target and nearly double survival
items.summary: For decades, pancreatic cancer has been one of the most lethal cancers, with few effective treatment options. A new drug, daraxonrasib, targets the KRAS mutation that fuels most pancreatic tumors—something many scientists once thought couldn't be done. In a major clinical trial, the treatment nearly

items.title: The biggest collagen study yet reveals what actually works
items.summary: A major review of nearly 8,000 participants found that collagen supplements can improve skin health and ease osteoarthritis symptoms, especially when taken consistently over longer periods. Researchers also found modest benefits for muscle and tendon health. But the results challenge claims that col

items.title: NASA’s X-59 Aircraft Flies Supersonic for First Time
items.summary: NASA’s experimental X-59 aircraft marked a major milestone Friday, June 5, when it flew faster than the speed of sound for the first time, setting the stage for demonstrating its quiet supersonic capabilities later this year.&#160

items.title: Goethe never knew this 40-million-year-old ant was hidden in his collection
items.summary: Scientists examining amber from Goethe’s personal collection discovered three hidden fossil insects, including an extinct ant preserved in extraordinary detail. Advanced 3D imaging allowed researchers to see not only the ant’s outer features but also structures inside its body. The findings offer ne

items.title: Hidden supermassive black hole pairs may finally have a visible signal
items.summary: Scientists have proposed a new method for finding tightly bound supermassive black hole pairs by searching for stars that flash repeatedly as their light is magnified by the black holes’ gravity.
